source_metadata.title: Internal RAG Logging and Human Review Policy
source_metadata.citation_label: Internal RAG Logging and Human Review Policy

section_path: Internal RAG Logging and Human Review Policy
content_blocks.text: Internal RAG Logging and Human Review Policy

items: RAG systems may log request metadata, selected document identifiers, and review outcomes needed for audit and quality checks.
Logs should minimize personal data and should not retain more content than is necessary for approved operational purposes.
Personal data included in prompts or retrieved passages must follow internal retention limits and access controls.
Teams should mask or minimize employee identifiers in routine debugging workflows whenever practical.
Route answers for human review when the request concerns personnel status, leave disputes, disciplinary matters, legal interpretation, or unresolved policy conflict.
Escalate when the assistant cannot support the answer with policy evidence from approved internal documents.
